verdict.reason: Two remaining issues: (1) Scenarios 1, 2, 3 each carry an extra assert(!phases.is_empty()) guard that is a second behavioral claim distinct from the stated one — drop these guards; (2) Scenarios 5 and 6 bypass the public server boundary by calling cfk_engine::events::append_event and cfk_engine::store::event_export_dir directly, coupling the test to the internal event-store layout. No cf_abandon MCP tool exists yet. Tests must be rewritten to use the public API once cf_abandon is implemented.
